requirement_topic.zh: ERC 与 MEPSO 并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: ERC 與 MEPSO 併網審查

summary.en: North Macedonia distributed solar projects may proceed under ERC framework rules where project scope qualifies, but the inverter is still reviewed in the project grid-connection file by the relevant distribution company and MEPSO-related technical acceptance process. Product test reports do not replace connection opinion, project approval, protection settings, metering, commissioning, or acceptance documents.
summary.zh: 北马其顿分布式光伏项目在 ERC 框架规则下可以推进，但逆变器仍需在相关配电公司和 MEPSO 相关技术验收路径的项目并网文件中接受审查。产品测试报告不能替代接入意见、项目批准、保护参数、计量、投运或验收文件。
summary.zht: 北馬其頓分散式太陽能項目在 ERC 框架規則下可推進，但逆變器仍需在相關配電公司及 MEPSO 相關技術驗收流程的專案併網文件中審查。產品測試報告不能替代接入意見、專案批准、保護參數、計量、投運或驗收文件。

standards_or_laws: North Macedonia electricity market and distributed generation framework administered by ERC
MEPSO and distribution-company project connection and acceptance practices

summary.en: China State Grid, China Southern Power Grid, GB/T 19964-2024, and GB/T 37408 documentation can support technical comparisons, but North Macedonia connection approval depends on local project, distribution company, ERC framework, and MEPSO-related acceptance route.
summary.zh: 中国国家电网、南方电网、GB/T 19964-2024 和 GB/T 37408 文件可支持技术比较，但北马其顿并网批准取决于当地项目、配电公司、ERC 框架及 MEPSO 相关验收路径。
summary.zht: 中國國家電網、南方電網、GB/T 19964-2024 及 GB/T 37408 文件可支援技術比較，但北馬其頓並網批准取決於當地專案、配電公司、ERC 框架及 MEPSO 相關驗收路徑。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project procedures

gap.en: The gap is North Macedonia project acceptance. Exporters should prepare single-line diagrams, inverter model certificates, protection setting tables, grid-code parameter ranges, reactive-power capability, remote-control or monitoring interface evidence, metering and communication compatibility, commissioning records, and Turkish-corridor-ready operations documentation for the receiving project owner and utility.
gap.zh: 差距在于北马其顿项目验收。出口商应准备单线图、逆变器型号证书、保护参数表、电网规范参数范围、无功能力、远程控制或监控接口证据、计量和通信兼容性、调试记录，以及供接收项目业主和电网企业使用的项目文件。
gap.zht: 差距在於北馬其頓專案驗收。出口商應準備單線圖、逆變器型號證書、保護參數表、電網規範參數範圍、無功能力、遠端控制或監控介面證據、計量和通信相容性、調試記錄，以及供接收專案業主和電網企業使用的文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects that seek North Macedonia grid connection under licensed or unlicensed renewable-generation pathways; acceptance is project- and distribution-company-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China grid approval does not transfer to North Macedonia ERC / MEPSO project approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat North Macedonia ERC/MEPSO grid connection as a project approval path separate from product CE or GB/T testing; Chinese grid evidence should not be presented as North Macedonia interconnection approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将北马其顿ERC/MEPSO并网视为独立于产品CE或GB/T测试的项目批准路径，中国并网证据不应被表述为北马其顿并网批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將北馬其頓 ERC/MEPSO 併網視為獨立於產品 CE 或 GB/T 測試的專案批准路徑，中國併網證據不應被表述為北馬其頓併網批准。
